items.title: [正面] Hot and complex with enjoyable gameplay, no less t...
items.summary:
Hot and complex with enjoyable gameplay, no less than that. Main story keep pacing and tension well, and cliffhangers almost reach level of Limbus Company hype, compared to similar Reverse 1999 project who lost me on dragging fillers. The current half-machine English translation is a bit rough, but the improvement update has already been announced and should arrive soon.

Didn't expect really good and balanced PvP mode in Hearthstone-like stile, characters acquiring economy also quite generous.
Already in my top 3 "more than gacha" tier list, played around 30 hours on mobile so far.
Hope we get Steam Deck compatibility at some point.
